actions.prompt_contract: Subtle in-place breathing loop with planted feet, a fixed root, and no locomotion.
actions.acceptance: Reads as one stable actor breathing in place; the closing frame returns cleanly to the opening pose.

actions.prompt_contract: Four-frame in-place walk ordered neutral, left step, exact neutral reuse, right step, with a fixed root and contact baseline.
actions.acceptance: A human visual review must confirm that frames 2 and 4 read as opposite-foot steps; frame 3 must be an exact pixel copy of frame 1.

actions.prompt_contract: Fast in-place run cycle with compression and flight phases, strong counter-swing, and a fixed root anchor.
actions.acceptance: Reads faster and more forcefully than walking, alternates support sides, includes flight phases, and loops without sliding.

actions.prompt_contract: One complete melee attack with readable anticipation, a decisive body-driven strike using the declared striking limb or equipment, an impact pose, and recovery.
actions.acceptance: Reads as a complete attack rather than an idle gesture; the striking limb or declared equipment, hands, body, identity, and facing stay coherent.

actions.prompt_contract: One complete ranged attack with aiming, draw or loading motion, release, recoil, and recovery; no projectile VFX baked in.
actions.acceptance: Reads as a ranged attack with coherent hand-to-weapon contact and a clear release while preserving equipment and identity.

actions.prompt_contract: Spell or skill casting body motion with gather, charge, release, follow-through, and recovery; external VFX remain separate.
actions.acceptance: The actor pose clearly communicates casting without relying on baked particles, glow, projectiles, or other effects.

actions.prompt_contract: Raise and hold a defensive guard, then return toward the ready stance while maintaining hand and equipment contact.
actions.acceptance: Reads as a defensive block with a stable guarded silhouette and no attack swing or equipment detachment.

actions.prompt_contract: Quick evasive body motion with anticipation, launch, clear evade pose, landing, and recovery inside the fixed cell.
actions.acceptance: Reads as a dodge rather than a walk or jump and remains contained without camera motion, teleporting, or identity drift.

actions.prompt_contract: Jump with crouch anticipation, takeoff, airborne apex, descent, and landing while staying centered in the cell.
actions.acceptance: Reads as a jump with real vertical pose change and a contained landing, not a scale change or whole-sheet translation.

actions.prompt_contract: Compact hit reaction with a readable impact and recoil followed by recovery, without changing direction or identity.
actions.acceptance: Reads as a hit reaction and preserves the same actor, equipment, scale, and facing through the recoil.

actions.prompt_contract: Non-looping collapse from the living pose into a stable downed final pose that remains the same identifiable actor.
actions.acceptance: Reads as one continuous death and ends on a stable corpse or downed pose; the final frame never returns to standing.

actions.prompt_contract: Reach toward an in-world target, make readable contact, and recover while keeping the actor rooted and facing consistently.
actions.acceptance: Reads as interaction or use without inventing the target object, changing identity, or becoming an attack.

actions.prompt_contract: Crouch and reach toward the ground, acquire an implied item, and rise back toward the ready stance.
actions.acceptance: Reads as picking up an item with a coherent crouch and rise; no unrelated object, attack motion, or identity drift is introduced.

actions.prompt_contract: Generate exactly one complete standalone actor pose as one isolated image, not an animation frame strip or sprite sheet.
actions.acceptance: Exactly one coherent full actor pose is visible with no alternate pose, duplicate, contact sheet, or sprite-sheet cells.
